signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 inflation rate confirmed at 2.16% YoY, up from 2.00% in February** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

South Korea's Consumer Price Index reached 118.8 in March 2026, with month-to-month inflation at 0.34% from February, marking a recent uptick that could influence prediction markets on annual inflation forecasts amid stabilizing trends from 2025's 2.13% average[1]. This data, new
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167 Million Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Hype | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167 Million Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Hype | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana's network reached an all-time high of 167 million monthly token holders as of April 14, 2026, with daily non-vote transactions hitting 148 million, driven by the Alpenglow consensus upgrade reducing finality to 150 milliseconds[1][6].
